results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board – Trump's legal attacks have 'left me no choice'
Fed Decision April 2026: Key Takeaways From Decision to Hold Rates Steady
Will the Fed cut interest rates? Here's what to expect at Wednesday's meeting.
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement

summary: FOMC voted 8-4 to hold benchmark funds rate at 3.5%-3.75%. Third consecutive hold. Largest FOMC dissent since October 1992. Inflation elevated from energy prices and tariffs. May be Powell's final meeting as chair. Rate range 3.5%-3.75%.
